title: Little Violet
content:
Appearance
[
]

Little Violet had no intelligence and was far from being as smart as 
Little White
. However, this tiger was completely purple and 30 feet long. It gave off a very oppressive aura.

Background
[
]

When 
Wang Lin
 and 
Zhou Ru
 traveled to an moon from 
Planet Suzaku
, Wang Lin had promise Zhou Ru to get her a larger tiger to replace 
Little White
. In the northern part of the moon, they caught a large tiger and Zhou Ru named him Little Violet. Wang Lin left an imprint on the tiger's soul, making Zhou Ru its master so it couldn't possibily turn on Zhou Ru.
